label: The five /design:* wrappers are isolated mode bridges with no upstream/downstream pipeline contract
recommendation: Add command-facing lifecycle metadata with acceptsFrom, produces, nextCommands, proofRequired and statusFields, then generate or drift-check wrapper sections from it.

label: The sk-design mode packets already encode lifecycle edges, but those edges are buried below the command layer
recommendation: Represent md-generator, foundations, interface, motion and audit as a metadata DAG whose edges cite packet integration points instead of moving lifecycle logic into the hub.

label: impeccable-main surfaces shared design context and context-aware next-command recommendations
recommendation: Add confirm-only /design or hub guidance that suggests the next 2-3 design commands from context signals instead of a static mode list.

label: The pipeline should be explicit handoff, not silent command chaining
recommendation: Add STATUS=OK/DEFER/ASK fields with PRODUCES, NEXT, TARGET_COMMAND and MISSING_INPUT, and forbid silent multi-command execution unless explicitly requested.

label: A /design:* lifecycle command must declare acceptsFrom, produces, nextCommands and proofRequired; auto-running the next command remains opt-in.
All five checked-in /design wrappers use the same direct mode bridge and status-only return shape.
Mode packet integration points already name downstream or sibling owners: md-generator to interface/sk-code, foundations to interface/motion/audit, interface/motion to sk-code, audit back to owners.
impeccable-main treats DESIGN.md as shared command context and exposes an ordered craft flow while keeping command recommendations confirm-only.

direction: Silently chain md-generator -> foundations -> interface -> motion -> audit for every broad design request
reason: The hub favors the smallest useful mode, the current wrappers defer cross-axis requests to the hub, audit explicitly does not implement fixes, and the corpus model makes next-command recommendations confirm-only.

impeccable-main makes DESIGN.md a shared context artifact every command reads
impeccable-main surfaces ordered end-to-end flows for full-feature work

focus: [D2-9/D2] no chaining/handoff between /design:* commands - surface the md-gen->foundations->interface->motion->audit pipeline (corpus: impeccable-main)
